sub_types.name: closed
sub_types.description: A pull request was closed. If merged is false in the webhook payload, the pull request was closed with unmerged commits. If merged is true in the webhook payload, the pull request was merged.

sub_types.name: edited
sub_types.description: The title or body of a pull request was edited, or the base branch of a pull request was changed.

sub_types.name: synchronize
sub_types.description: A pull request's head branch was updated. For example, the head branch was updated from the base branch or new commits were pushed to the head branch.

sub_types.name: reopened
sub_types.description: A previously closed pull request was reopened.

sub_types.name: push
sub_types.description: This event occurs when there is a push to a repository branch. This includes when a commit is pushed, when a commit tag is pushed, when a branch is deleted, when a tag is deleted, or when a repository is created from a template.

sub_types.name: submitted
sub_types.description: A review on a pull request was submitted.
